prompt: Is there a relationship between course credits and average grade?

inputData.question: Is there a relationship between course credits and average grade?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Is there a relationship between course credits and average grade?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Is there a relationship between course credits and average grade?"},"startedAt":1771855966670,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The user is asking whether there is a relationship between course credits and average grade. I've discovered the schema and executed a query that groups courses by their credit value and calculates the average exam score for each credit level. The results show variation in average grades across different credit values (3, 4, 5, 6 credits), which suggests there may be a relationship. The query joins courses → course_sections → enrollments → grades to correlate credits with performance metrics.","sql":"
SELECT 
  c.credits,
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(g.exam_score AS NUMERIC)), 2) AS avg_grade,
  COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) AS enrollment_count
FROM courses c
JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
JOIN grades g ON e.id = g.enrollment_id
WHERE g.exam_score IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.credits
ORDER BY c.credits ASC
","assumptions":["Assuming 'average grade' refers to exam_score from the grades table","Assuming we should analyze the relationship by grouping courses by their credit value","Assuming only non-null exam scores should be included in the analysis","Assuming the relationship is analyzed across all available enrollments and grades"]},"endedAt":1771856007213},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"

visualization.title: Relationship Between Course Credits and Average Grade
visualization.description: Scatter plot showing the correlation between course credits and average exam grades

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  c.credits,
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(g.exam_score AS NUMERIC)), 2) AS avg_grade,
  COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) AS enrollment_count
FROM courses c
JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
JOIN grades g ON e.id = g.enrollment_id
WHERE g.exam_score IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.credits
ORDER BY c.credits ASC

visualization.title: Relationship Between Course Credits and Average Grade
visualization.description: Scatter plot showing the correlation between course credits and average exam grades

result.sql:
SELECT 
  c.credits,
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(g.exam_score AS NUMERIC)), 2) AS avg_grade,
  COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) AS enrollment_count
FROM courses c
JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
JOIN grades g ON e.id = g.enrollment_id
WHERE g.exam_score IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.credits
ORDER BY c.credits ASC
